name: Upstage SOLAR 10.7B
archDisplay: Depth Up-Scaled (DUS) dense transformer — two 24-layer Mistral-7B-derived stacks merged to 48 layers, then continually pretrained
note: DUS-merged from two Mistral-7B copies; the Instruct variant (H6=74.20) briefly topped the Dec 2023 HF Open LLM Leaderboard.

results.notes: Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), Open-LLM-Leaderboard-style 25-shot ARC-Challenge.
Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), 10-shot HellaSwag.
Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), 5-shot MMLU.
Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), 0-shot TruthfulQA.
Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), 5-shot Winogrande.
Table 2 of the SOLAR 10.7B paper (base model row), 5-shot GSM8K.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Upstage released SOLAR-10.7B on 2023-12-13, topping the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (confirmed via Upstage's own news page and MarkTechPost). Fetched the Hugging Face model card and confirmed ~11B (10.7B) params, Depth Up-Scaling from Mistral-7B, Apache 2.0 license for the base model, and the H6 base score of 66.04 literally appears there. Instruct variant's 74.20 H6 (cited only in the note, not a results row) independently corroborated by search.
